name: FBG Arcade Machine
short_description: 2 elegant arcade games in 1 package! Set your high score - raising the stakes on your friend, and the whole world. "Run and Gun" will have you blasting ghosts and collecting coins in this fast-paced endless shooter. Try "Rock and Stone" a thrilling 3-D Asteroid defence! What will your high score be?
detailed_description:
TWO GAMES... ONE PACKAGE!



Run and Gun
Things start slow - but with an ever-increasing player speed, you'll soon be masterfully dashing across the stage blasting ghastly ghosts, collecting coins and ammo, all while avoiding the unbreakable barriers



Rock and Stone
This game only requires mouse input, but that doesn't mean it will be easy! Stand your ground and protect yourself from endless waves of rocks and stones. Stay alive long enough to set a high score!

Support
I would like to thank each and everyone who buys this game, and that everyone enjoys playing it as much as I've enjoyed making it. This game is the first release I have ever done. Hope your days are as wonderful as you are! Happy Gaming!
